'''âv-z-y''' ('''vazaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nerdify|nerdify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nerdify|nerdify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-z-y
|-
! Lemma
| vazaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vazayithi|vazayithi]] || [[word:vazayiji|vazayiji]] || [[word:vazayishi|vazayishi]] || [[word:vazayi|vazayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazayuthuth|vazayuthuth]] || [[word:vazayujuj|vazayujuj]] || [[word:vazayushush|vazayushush]] || [[word:vazay|vazay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazayuthu|vazayuthu]] || [[word:vazayuju|vazayuju]] || [[word:vazayushu|vazayushu]] || [[word:vazayu|vazayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazayufuth|vazayufuth]] || [[word:vazayufuj|vazayufuj]] || [[word:vazayufush|vazayufush]] || [[word:vazayuf|vazayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vazayethe|vazayethe]] || [[word:vazayeje|vazayeje]] || [[word:vazayeshe|vazayeshe]] || [[word:vazaye|vazaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazayothoth|vazayothoth]] || [[word:vazayojoj|vazayojoj]] || [[word:vazayoshosh|vazayoshosh]] || [[word:vazay|vazay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazayotho|vazayotho]] || [[word:vazayojo|vazayojo]] || [[word:vazayosho|vazayosho]] || [[word:vazayo|vazayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazayofoth|vazayofoth]] || [[word:vazayofoj|vazayofoj]] || [[word:vazayofosh|vazayofosh]] || [[word:vazayof|vazayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vazayĂŠthĂŠ|vazayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vazayĂŠjĂŠ|vazayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vazayĂŠshĂŠ|vazayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vazayĂŠ|vazayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazayathath|vazayathath]] || [[word:vazayajaj|vazayajaj]] || [[word:vazayashash|vazayashash]] || [[word:vazay|vazay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazayatha|vazayatha]] || [[word:vazayaja|vazayaja]] || [[word:vazayasha|vazayasha]] || [[word:vazaya|vazaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazayafath|vazayafath]] || [[word:vazayafaj|vazayafaj]] || [[word:vazayafash|vazayafash]] || [[word:vazayaf|vazayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vazayasha|vazayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govazayasha|govazayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivazayasha|gokivazayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vazaynĂŒsha|vazaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govazaynknĂŒsha|govazaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivazaynĂŒsha|gokivazaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vazayshĂ«sha|vazayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govazaynkshĂ«sha|govazaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivazayshĂ«sha|gokivazayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vazayrosha|vazayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govazaynkrosha|govazaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivazayrosha|gokivazayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vazaymusha|vazaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govazaynkmusha|govazaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazaymusha|gokivazaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vazaysherasha|vazaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govazaynksherasha|govazaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivazaysherasha|gokivazaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vazayngasha|vazayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govazaynkngasha|govazaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivazayngasha|gokivazayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vazayasha|vazayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govazaynkyasha|govazaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivazayasha|gokivazayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vazayamasha|vazayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govazaynkyamasha|govazaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivazayamasha|gokivazayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vazaynĂŒshĂ«sha|vazaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govazaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|govazaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivazaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivazaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vazaynĂŒrosha|vazaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govazaynknĂŒrosha|govazaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivazaynĂŒrosha|gokivazaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazaynĂŒmusha|vazaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazaynknĂŒmusha|govazaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazaynĂŒmusha|gokivazaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vazayshĂ«nĂŒsha|vazayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govazaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govazaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivazayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivazayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vazayshĂ«rosha|vazayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govazaynkshĂ«rosha|govazaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivazayshĂ«rosha|gokivazayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazayshĂ«musha|vazayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazaynkshĂ«musha|govazaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazayshĂ«musha|gokivazayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vazayronĂŒsha|vazayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govazaynkronĂŒsha|govazaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivazayronĂŒsha|gokivazayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vazayroshĂ«sha|vazayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govazaynkroshĂ«sha|govazaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivazayroshĂ«sha|gokivazayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazayromusha|vazayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazaynkromusha|govazaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazayromusha|gokivazayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vazaymunĂŒsha|vazaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govazaynkmunĂŒsha|govazaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivazaymunĂŒsha|gokivazaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vazaymushĂ«sha|vazaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govazaynkmushĂ«sha|govazaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivazaymushĂ«sha|gokivazaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vazaymurosha|vazaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govazaynkmurosha|govazaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivazaymurosha|gokivazaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vazay|vazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠy|vĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovazay|hovazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠzĂŠy|hovĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovazay|hohovazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠzĂŠy|hohovĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvazay|nĂŒvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠzĂŠy|nĂŒvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvazay|nĂŒnĂŒvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠzĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvazay|nĂŻvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠzĂŠy|nĂŻvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvazay|nĂŻnĂŻvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠzĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvazay|luvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠzĂŠy|luvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvazay|luluvazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠzĂŠy|luluvĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livazay|livazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠzĂŠy|livĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivazay|lilivazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠzĂŠy|lilivĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovazay|kovazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠzĂŠy|kovĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovazay|kokovazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠzĂŠy|kokovĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevazay|kevazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠzĂŠy|kevĂŠzĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevazay|kekevazay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠzĂŠy|kekevĂŠzĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
